samWhat: The sAMAccountName is the user login (e.g. jsmith).
samWhere: In User Lookup, select a user - it is shown just below the display name with a copy button.
removeFromGroupsDesc: Remove from all groups except Domain Users
removeGroupsDesc: Remove from all groups except Domain Users
setRandomPasswordDesc: Reset password to a random value
moveToDisabledOuDesc: Move the user to a designated Disabled Users OU
moveToDisabledOUDesc: Move the user to a designated Disabled Users OU
passwordWillBeReset: Password will be reset to random value
accessDenied: Offboarding requires AccountOperator permission or higher.
accessDeniedDescription: Offboarding requires AccountOperator permission or higher.
